modules.name: Outbreak
modules.description: Network SIR — infection spreads through an internally generated graph (Watts-Strogatz, Erdős–Rényi, or Barabási–Albert) at rate β per infected neighbour per tick, with recovery rate γ. Network topology dramatically changes outbreak dynamics: small-world graphs spread fast via shortcuts; preferential-attachment hubs become superspreaders. Visualization shows the network coloured by S / I / R state plus a small S/I/R trajectory.
